[(16 × 9) + (3 ÷ 2)] − (7 + 4)] × 2
Which statement regarding molecular movement (living character) of viruses is correct?
o: A virus does not grow in an artificial medium.
Inactive until they infect some cell.

How many people are sitting to the right of K?

kept.q: The base of the right-angled triangle is 3 m greater than its height. If its hypotenuse is 15 m, then find its area.

Three statements are followed by three conclusions numbered I, II and III. You have to consider these statements to be true, even if they seem to be at variance with commonly known facts. Decide which of the given conclusions logically follow(s) from the given statements.
Statements:
Some eggs are wheats.
Some fruits are gravels.
All gravels are bottles.
Conclusions:
(I) Some fruits are wheats.
(II) Some bottles are fruits.
(III) Some eggs are gravels.
o: Either conclusion I or III follows

kept.q: Some bacteria are photosynthetic. Where are the photosynthetic pigments located in these cells?
o: In the infolding of the plasma membrane

kept.q: When a magnet is moved into a coil connected to a galvanometer, the current is induced in the coil. The induced current does not depend on which of the following factor?

Speed of movement of the magnet
Resistance of the galvanometer connected in the coil
The pole strength of the magnet
